display_description.he: הכנה ואימות של דוחות מע"מ (דו"ח מעמ) בהתאם לדרישות רשות המסים
display_description.en: Prepare, validate, and guide submission of Israeli VAT reports (Doch Maam) per Tax Authority standards. Use when user asks about VAT reporting, VAT calculation, "doch maam", "maam", Israeli VAT filing, VAT deadlines, or input/output VAT reconciliation. Supports monthly, bi-monthly, and annual reporting. Handles zero-rated exports, exempt transactions, and Eilat zone rules. Do NOT use for income tax, corporate tax, or non-Israeli VAT systems.
